title: Feature Index Row
description: Phase 46 (#40): structured shape for one row of a FEATURE_INDEX.md table. Tooling that parses the markdown can validate each row against this shape. The markdown table is the canonical artifact; this schema mirrors its row shape for programmatic consumers.

id.description: Stable identifier (e.g., FX091). Never reassigned; deprecated entries keep their ID.

source_of_truth.description: file:line where the feature is implemented. Empty when feature is purely conceptual.

doc_citation.description: Link or path to user-facing documentation. Empty when internal.

test_path.description: File path containing the feature-level test. Empty when status is unverified or n/a.

surface.description: Optional (GH #196). User-facing product surface the feature ships on (e.g. command, route, settings-card, voice). Free-text in V1; a governed vocabulary is a deferred follow-on.

n_a_rationale.description: Required when status is n/a; explains why the feature is intentionally untested.
